channel.title: Blog on Analyst
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Analyst

item.title: Once There Lived Frida
item.description: 📆 24/04/2021 , Saturday 🕰 10:21 AM. It’s an ordinary gloomy Mordor morning. To be honest, I was hoping for a sunny one… But may be one has to live somewhere else to claim that 🤷‍♀️.

item.title: How I Got Started With ARM
item.description: 📆 Friday, 12th of March, 202 ⏰ 09:00 ☀️ It was a very deceptively sunny morning, children laughing and squeaking merrily.

item.title: How I Got Started With AWS
item.description: In this blog post I am exploring AWS services (EC2). I am currently using a Free Tier license and I am trying to learn how to use.

item.title: How I Have Built My Lab
item.description: One late evening when my eyes were so difficult to keep open, I’ve decided to setup a Windows Lab on my M1 Mac.

item.title: Hacking the Art of Exploitation
item.description: I’ve been longing to finish Hacking the Art of Exploitation book, but I needed VM for that and this wasn’t very convenient.

item.title: Spoiling Dr Evil
item.description: I’ve decided to solve a puzzle per week just to keep myself “forensically fit”. This is my case study of Dr.

item.title: A Few Good Bits
item.description: Saturday I’ve recently have had a severe poisoning (I only hope it’s not the rotavirus 😨) and I’ve spent one evening and one day barely moving.

item.title: How I Met Python Hell
item.description: Lorem markdownum aequalis strigis. Saetigeri iubeas, vultu huic alvum nondum de obside ut laniavit arbor palmis, cum quin.

item.title: How I Met Radare2
item.description: 📆 24/09/2020, Wednesday 🕰 7:00 What a nice morning! And it’s so great to be woken up by a high-pitched cry in the ear… Well, after giving my daughter her breakfast and doing all the neccessary hygine procedures for us both, I left her by my side on the development carpet, so that I could develop myself…

item.title: Python3 And The Deathly Hallows
item.description: Beautiful Python 🐍, which has so many small blocks of code that ease the task so much!

item.title: How I Met Fragment Injection
item.description: Friday Moscow has again become Mordor-like, the Sun is starting to make its heat more official rather than genuine because it’s getting desperately cold.

item.title: How I Met Predator
item.description: Wednesday *Ничего так, тепло.* Где-то в тёмном-тёмном лесу, среди высоких старых деревьев, притаившись в кустах выжидают свою жертву хищники.

item.title: Undesirable Mail
item.description: Thursday, Warm and cloudy. “Open me! I am a payment order! I am important, I swear!

item.title: How I Met .NET Confuser
item.description: Tuesday, Прохладно, как будто вот-вот пойдет дождь, но нет…. Приятно бывает встретиться лицом к лицу с сильным противником, потому что именно в такие моменты, после таких “битв”, становишься сильнее.

item.title: How I Met Hugo
item.description: There was a time when I was desperately trying to become a web programmer (those wonderful days of naïve curiosity🤦‍♀️).
